title: ShareYourCloning, a web application to document and share molecular cloning strategies
author: Manuel Lera-Ramírez
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
ShareYourCloning is an Open Source web application to document and share molecular cloning strategies in json format. The files include a presentation introducing the project, and a video narrating the presentation. 

 Some useful links: 

 
	 Repository url: https://github.com/manulera/ShareYourCloning 
	 Hosted version of the application: https://shareyourcloning.netlify.app 
 

 If you want to get involved, please visit the contribution guidelines in the repo: https://github.com/manulera/ShareYourCloning/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md
steps_raw:
